task_text: hermes-version-monitoring — read-only on-VPS Hermes version monitor (systemd timer) verifying live runtime pin (commit + bridge.js sha256 + patch markers) vs shipped baseline, best-effort fail-safe git ls-remote upstream check, JSON report, notify-on-change operator alerts via shift-agent-notify-owner, deploy wiring, Track B 0.17 upgrade plan doc.
